mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE barcode = #{barcode} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM product WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND barcode = #{barcode} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM product WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' ORDER BY category
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM product WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' ORDER BY category
SELECT * FROM product ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM product WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM product WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM product WHERE (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR barcode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM product WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR barcode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY id DESC
